host:permissions.safetyStatus.change: Adds the permission inventory's bounded read of workspace and per-agent authority locks; the ordinary permissions.read capability and workspace membership checks remain in force.

host:permissions.setWorkspaceAuthorityLo.change: Adds the critical control that durably blocks protected agent authority workspace-wide before interrupting live agent transports. Releasing the barrier uses the same reviewed critical capability.

direct:workspace/packages/agentic-do/src.change: Adds a host-only lifecycle operation that enumerates the exact agent vessel's subscribed channels and interrupts their active transports while flushing deferred work; no user, code, or entity principal can invoke it directly.

direct:workspace/packages/semantic-contr.change: Adds an open, read-only exact-coordinate projection over existing trajectory, semantic command, effect-intent, and receipt authorities; every collection is bounded and reports truncation, and the method performs no mutation.

host:contextIntegrity.explain.change: Adds a read-only agent-bound explanation of a lineage coordinate already present in the caller's own session. The receiver derives session identity, verifies aggregate content addressing, and returns bounded opaque-cursor pages.

host:systemAgent.resolveConversation.change: Restores the reviewed open-tier census entry for resolving the caller's own product-owned System Agent conversation; workspace membership and the pinned trusted-code roster remain independent receiver checks.

host:app.openShellSurface.change: Adds open navigation to an enumerated first-party shell management surface in the current client; it neither opens an external system nor changes managed state, and the receiver rejects unknown targets.

host:onboardingStatus.read.change: Adds a read-only aggregate of existing host-owned onboarding facts for the calling workspace and device; it returns normalized status only, performs no live verification, and exposes no credential secret.

direct:workspace/packages/agentic-do/src.change: Adds a host-only, open runtime-intrinsic wake hint after an authority acquisition settles. Durable effect outbox state remains the continuation and ordinary alarms recover a lost hint.
Adds a host-only lifecycle operation that attaches an existing exact agent entity to a channel; the channel independently authenticates the subscribing Durable Object identity.

direct:workspace/workers/pubsub-channel/.change: Adds host-only atomic initialization of an immutable exact-participant channel boundary; user and code callers cannot create, replace, or widen the locked membership policy.

direct:src/server/internalDOs/evalDO.ts:.change: Adds a host-only, gated code-execution authority that creates or refreshes the exact EvalDO incarnation's bounded idle residency lease. The receiver validates the lease identity and duration, and no user or code principal may invoke it directly.
Adds a host-only, gated code-execution authority that atomically claims the single held-request slot for an already-active exact kernel lease. It cannot create, widen, or extend a lease.

Adds a host-only, gated code-execution authority whose request remains held only for the exact attached lease and settles on expiry, release, or replacement. It exposes no scope data and cannot outlive the receiver-owned lease deadline.
